title: Perfect Gen
description: This modpack redefines the experience of exploring and reshaping the world. Packed with light RPG elements, this pack brings adventurous spirits together with captivating quests, mythical creatures and immersive world-building.
body:
![baslık](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb6b262ed6160cd0dd35f5c6d3a02e2323e7e1e9.png)

**The modpack creates a visual spectacle with mods that restructure world generation. Additionally, the added building mods enhance your RPG experience in the game world.**

**The modpack not only includes structures but also the mobs that spawn in those structures, adding many new mobs to the game.**
